title: Medigun
description: a fully healing Medigun in fabric 1.21.4 Minecraft
body:
This mod adds a basic Medigun into Minecraft, as of now its basic and can only heal players, it has particles, it lacks sound effects, but can compensate for healing potions and etc, this mod is by a fan for fans. i dont allow my mod to be distributed to other platforms, other than CurseForge and Modrinth/PMC, unless its in modpacks, this mod will stay on fabric, i have no plans of porting it to Forge or Neoforge, but you can port it to Neoforge, Forge or Quilt if you credit me and give me permission first. you are allowed to make addons to this pack, but they must be in fabric.There are no current plans to port to Forge, Neoforge, Quilt, or any other loader than Fabric as Forge sucks. There are also no plans to backport to versions older than 1.21.

the Liquified Mystic Shrubs heal you in seconds, no matter what injury.

❓ Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Why?
A: Because I wanted to bring the good old Nostalgic weapons back.

Q: Why no port to Forge or Neoforge?
A: Because Fabric honestly feels more refreshing, cooler and updated than Forge, and im more used to Fabric, i rather use Fabric than Forge, considering the drama surrounding Forge.

Q: will there be a Übercharge

A: it has been canonically introduced in the mod.

Q: Do you plan to port it back to version 1.x?

A: i am no longer updating this mod, so there wont be a port to 1.x.

the Mod currently has the Medigun, Syringe Gun, Bonesaw and the Quick-Fix, also RED and BLU variants of all those weapons, alongside the Liquified Mystic Shrub.
